name: Backrooms: Skibidi Shooter 2
description: Backrooms Skibidi Shooter 2 is a first person shooter game where your mission is to find a way out backrooms crowded with hostile skibidi toilets, use big arsenal of weapons to shoot your way through the levels and try to find the exit in order to progress.
instructions: WASD - Move LMB - Shoot RMB - Aim R - Reload G - Grenade Space - Jump
tags: 1 Player, 3D, 3D Games, Action, First Person Shooter, Shoot, Shoot 'Em Up, Shooter, Shooting, Skibidi, Skibidi Toilet, Unity3D
